prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Atorvastatin (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 112.9 kg; Height 182.3 cm; BMI 34.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/66 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 238mg/dL; 9 months ago 208mg/dL; 6 months ago 207mg/dL; 3 months ago 188mg/dL; current 134mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 112.2kg; 9 months ago 111.7kg; 6 months ago 110.9kg; 3 months ago 109.3kg; current 112.9kg), Height (12 months ago 182.3cm; 9 months ago 182.3cm; 6 months ago 182.3cm; 3 months ago 182.3cm; current 182.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 34.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 67mmHg; 9 months ago 67mmHg; 6 months ago 67mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 66mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 29U/L), AST (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 11U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 31mg/g; 9 months ago 32mg/g; 6 months ago 30mg/g; 3 months ago 30mg/g; current 36mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 58mg/dL; current 60mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 168mg/dL; 9 months ago 151mg/dL; 6 months ago 166mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 156mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
